ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rochon Perry (Petitioner).

The Court expressed concern about the settlement agreement and the petitions for probate. Ms. Ng stated that she has never seen a written agreement and that there is another agreement between Mr. Koplowitz and Mr. Boessenecker. The Court also questioned if the agreement needs to be noticed to all Heirs and whether Mr. Koplowitz' fees could be approved before the four month Creditor's Claim period. Ms. Ng stated that the Sister signed a waiver, that she has had communication with Espanola and Latrinka, that she spoke with the Tax Collector and that she is waiting for a waiver from Tax Collector. The Petition for Approval of Will Contest Settlement Agreement, etc. and the Petitions for Probate were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rochon Perry (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there are three petitions before the Court with an understanding from Ms. Ng that Mr. Kumar for Wells Fargo is dropping his petition. Ms. Ng stated that Mr. Kumar informed her that he is not making an appearance this morning. Furthermore, Ms. Ng presented a letter from Mr. Boessenecker stating that if Ms. Ng files a Proof of Holographic Instrument, he will withdraw his petition. Ms. Ng stated that she has filed the Proof of Holographic Instrument and she explained the relationship between Katrinka Perry and Espanola Jones. The matter was continued to 2014 at January 21, 2014 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court may be in position to pre-grant Ms. Ng's petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
